generated_internal_driver.primary: A desire to act responsibly while preserving relationships and credibility.
generated_internal_driver.hidden_risk: Delaying a hard choice until circumstances force a weaker option.

dharma_duty.note: Role obligations are present but not singularly decisive here.

satya_truth.note: The user appears oriented toward truthful disclosure over convenience.

ahimsa_nonharm.note: The likely path can reduce avoidable harm with measured communication.

nishkama_detachment.note: Attachment to outcome is mixed and not yet clear from details.

shaucha_intent.note: Intent seems partly clean but still braided with self-protection.

sanyama_restraint.note: There are signs of restraint rather than impulsive escalation.

lokasangraha_welfare.note: A careful decision could improve collective trust and stability.

viveka_discernment.note: Discernment is emerging though some practical unknowns remain.

generated_missing_facts: Which stakeholder bears the highest downside if this choice goes wrong?
